pr.title: Match and improve several source functions
pr.author: itsgrimetime

summary: Batch PR with independent source matching improvements across THP decode, fighter item handling, Ice Mountain ground logic, menu count sorting, and sysdolphin particle initialization. Evidence includes PR body verification commands, diff excerpts, bot score report, and one review thread that replaced a local user_data helper with existing GET_GROUND().

key_files.role: Matched __THPRestartDefinition by introducing a local THPRestartFields overlay and accessing nMCU, currMCU, and RST through it.
Improved ft_800895E0 by removing a temporary Item_GObj local and reusing fp->item_gobj directly for the item GObj load shape.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: improve ft_800895E0 by reusing the item GObj load shape
diff_excerpt: removed Item_GObj* temp and passed fp->item_gobj to it_8026B6C8

key_files.role: Improved grIceMt_801F9ACC by changing return type to int, returning did/0, widening id to s32, adding PAD_STACK(16), using GET_GROUND() instead of direct user_data access, and introducing a HSD_JObj** temporary for icemt2.xC8.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: improve grIceMt_801F9ACC by tightening the Ice Mountain data/ID handling
diff_excerpt: grIceMt_801F9ACC return type and GET_GROUND replacements
review_comments: reviewer asked whether existing GET_GROUND() could be used
review_comments: author said fixed by removing local user_data helper and switching call sites to GET_GROUND()

key_files.role: Updated grIceMt_801F9ACC prototype from void to int to match the recovered body signature.
Improved mnCount_8025092C by moving CountEntry tmp to function scope, removing PAD_STACK(8), and reshaping the row comparison.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: improve mnCount_8025092C by reshaping the row comparison
diff_excerpt: CountEntry tmp declaration moved and comparison changed to entries[min].val < entries[j].val

key_files.role: Matched hsd_80398C04 by using hsd_804D0908 indexing, correcting particle color field initialization, and changing sizeTarget initialization to rotateTarget.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: hsd_804D0908 slot access, primCol/envCol initialization, rotateTarget assignment

what_changed.text: Two functions were reported as new 100% matches: hsd_80398C04 and __THPRestartDefinition.
Three functions were reported as improved but not fully matched: grIceMt_801F9ACC, mnCount_8025092C, and ft_800895E0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: 📈 3 improvements in unmatched items table

what_changed.text: The PR body lists verification commands: python configure.py --require-protos, ninja build/GALE01/report.json, and ninja.
A review-requested cleanup in gricemt.c replaced a proposed/local user_data helper and direct user_data access with existing GET_GROUND() call sites.
evidence_refs: review_comments: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_comments: Fixed in the latest push: removed the local user_data helper and switched the call sites in grIceMt_801F9ACC to GET_GROUND().

smart_moves.text: When a recovered body proved a return value for grIceMt_801F9ACC, the header prototype was updated alongside the source body.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gricemt.h prototype changed to int

smart_moves.text: The particle match used existing indexed storage hsd_804D0908[linkNo] instead of pointer arithmetic from hsd_804D08E8.
Review feedback caught an opportunity to use an existing accessor macro instead of adding or keeping a local helper for Ground user data.
evidence_refs: review_comments: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_comments: Fixed in the latest push...

decomp_lessons.lesson: If source recovery shows a function returns meaningful state, update both the body and owning header prototype together rather than leaving a stale void declaration.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grIceMt_801F9ACC void -> int in gricemt.c
diff_excerpt: grIceMt_801F9ACC void -> int in gricemt.h

decomp_lessons.lesson: Prefer existing typed/accessor forms over local helper or raw user_data access when the project already has an accessor for the object kind.
evidence_refs: review_comments: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_comments: Fixed in the latest push: removed the local user_data helper and switched the call sites in grIceMt_801F9ACC to GET_GROUND().
diff_excerpt: multiple GET_GROUND(Ground_801C2BA4(...)) and GET_GROUND(mgobj) replacements

decomp_lessons.lesson: Exact field choice matters for matching and correctness: the particle initializer changed envColTarget/sizeTarget-style writes to primCol/envCol/rotateTarget writes and was reported as a full match.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: primCol/envCol and rotateTarget assignments in hsd_80398C04

decomp_lessons.lesson: Temporary overlay structs can be used narrowly to express fields at known offsets when the current base type does not generate the needed access shape, as shown by THPRestartFields for __THPRestartDefinition.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: typedef struct THPRestartFields with pad[0x8FC], nMCU, currMCU, RST

naming_conventions.name: THPRestartFields
naming_conventions.context: Local overlay struct introduced near THP globals to name restart-related fields nMCU, currMCU, and RST.

naming_conventions.name: GET_GROUND
naming_conventions.context: Existing macro/accessor preferred over a PR-local grIceMt_GetUserData helper for Ground_GObj user data access.
evidence_refs: review_comments: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_comments: Fixed in the latest push: removed the local user_data helper...

naming_conventions.name: new_var
naming_conventions.context: Temporary HSD_JObj** local used to hold &gp->gv.icemt2.xC8 in grIceMt_801F9ACC; evidence supports its presence but not that it is a durable naming convention.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: HSD_JObj** new_var and ptrs = new_var

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a narrow temporary overlay struct for offset-sensitive field accesses in __THPRestartDefinition.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: THPRestartFields cast and field accesses

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use direct member reloads instead of a saved temporary when that load shape improves matching.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: improve ft_800895E0 by reusing the item GObj load shape
diff_excerpt: removed Item_GObj* temp and used fp->item_gobj directly

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Declaration placement can affect matching: mnCount_8025092C moved CountEntry tmp to function scope and removed PAD_STACK(8).
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: CountEntry tmp added before int i, j, min; PAD_STACK(8) removed

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK remained in grIceMt_801F9ACC as PAD_STACK(16), correlated with a reported score improvement but not a full match.
Replacing pointer arithmetic with a known symbol-indexed array can resolve relocation differences for a code match.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: removed comment about asm bytes identical with relocation differences
diff_excerpt: hsd_804D08E8 pointer arithmetic replaced with &hsd_804D0908[linkNo]

review_feedback.comment: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_feedback.resolution_evidence: Author replied that the latest push removed the local user_data helper and switched grIceMt_801F9ACC call sites to GET_GROUND(); final diff shows GET_GROUND() call sites.

evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: six changed files with hunk counts
raw_diff: full diff excerpt available and not truncated
text_corpus issue_comment: bot report with match/improvement percentages
review_comments: GET_GROUND review and author resolution
metadata_json: PR state MERGED and timestamps
notes: Loaded raw PR JSON is truncated, but extracted PR body, diff, changed files, review comments, and text corpus are sufficient for this intake.
The bot report supports match/improvement percentages, but this intake does not independently rerun builds, objdiff, or regression checks.
PAD_STACK in grIceMt_801F9ACC is recorded as a tactic correlated with improvement evidence, not as a general accepted style.
The temporary name new_var is preserved as diff evidence only; no semantic naming claim is supported.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use existing accessors instead of local user_data helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In gricemt.c review, a proposed/local Ground user_data helper was challenged with 'can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?' and the author resolved it by removing the helper and switching grIceMt_801F9ACC call sites to GET_GROUND().

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when function body recovery proves a signature
accepted_candidate_records.text: grIceMt_801F9ACC changed from void to int in the source body, added return values, and updated the gricemt.h prototype in the same PR.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: gricemt.h grIceMt_801F9ACC prototype returns int

accepted_candidate_records.title: Resolve relocation-sensitive particle slots with known indexed storage
accepted_candidate_records.text: hsd_80398C04 replaced pointer arithmetic from hsd_804D08E8 with &hsd_804D0908[linkNo]; the bot report marked the function as a new 100% match.

source_update_candidates.title: gricemt Ground user_data access should use GET_GROUND when applicable
source_update_candidates.text: For src/melee/gr/gricemt.c, review evidence from PR #2582 supports preferring existing GET_GROUND() call sites over a local helper or direct Ground_GObj user_data access in grIceMt_801F9ACC.
evidence_refs: review_comments: can this use an existing GET_GROUND()?
review_comments: Fixed in the latest push: removed the local user_data helper and switched the call sites in grIceMt_801F9ACC to GET_GROUND().
source_update_candidates.reason: This is path-specific review evidence that may be useful as a local convention, but should be curated before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: hsd_80398C04 uses hsd_804D0908 indexed slots for head-null insertion
source_update_candidates.text: In src/sysdolphin/baselib/particle.c, PR #2582 matched hsd_80398C04 by replacing pointer arithmetic from hsd_804D08E8 with slot = (HSD_Particle**) &hsd_804D0908[linkNo] when head == NULL.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful local data-symbol/path fact; needs curator validation against current symbols and source.

source_update_candidates.title: __THPRestartDefinition matched with THPRestartFields overlay
source_update_candidates.text: In extern/dolphin/src/dolphin/thp/THPDec.c, PR #2582 introduced THPRestartFields with pad[0x8FC], nMCU, currMCU, and RST, then cast THPFileInfo* to this overlay inside __THPRestartDefinition; bot report marked the function 100%.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential local matching note; should be curated carefully because overlay structs can be temporary bridge code rather than desired final type modeling.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK(16) in grIceMt_801F9ACC as a general convention; the PR only shows a local tactic with improvement evidence and no full match.
Do not promote the temporary local name new_var as a naming convention; it appears only as a matching aid in the diff.
Do not infer reviewer intent beyond the explicit GET_GROUND() comment and the author’s stated resolution.
Do not claim all verification commands passed independently; the PR body lists them and the bot report supplies score evidence, but this intake did not rerun tooling.
